subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be My glory and My peace - the breathings of revelation from the realm of justice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک بهائی و سلامی نفحات وحی عالم عدل
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @law of obligatory prayer, @law of fasting, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @unity; oneness of humanity, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world
